quotes.text: Chemicals themselves will simply not give rise to consciousness or to life. Your scientists will simply have to face the facts that consciousness comes first, and evolves its own form. But this is, and involves, individuality, and also interdependence. The physical body that you imagine consists of some sort of separate consciousness, controlling a framework of completely unconscious parts, is quite farfetched.
quotes.translation: 化学物质本身根本无法产生意识或生命。你们的科学家终将面对事实：意识先于一切，并演化出自身形态。但这既涉及个体性，也涉及相互依存。你们想象中由独立意识控制着完全无意识部件框架的肉体，这种构想实在牵强。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: For one thing, while pain is unpleasant it is also a method of familiarizing the self against the edges of quickened consciousness. Any heightened sensation, pleasant or unpleasant, has a stimulating effect upon a consciousness to some degree. It is a strong awareness of activity and life. Where the stimulus may be extremely annoying, and humiliatingly unpleasant, certain portions of the psychological framework accept it indiscriminatingly because it is a sensation, and a vivid one. This acquiescence to even painful stimuli is a basic part of the nature of consciousness, and a necessary one.
quotes.translation: 首先，痛苦虽令人不悦，却是让自我熟悉意识加速边缘的方法。任何强烈感受——无论愉悦与否——都在某种程度上对意识产生刺激效应。这是对活动与生命的强烈觉知。当刺激极度恼人且令人难堪时，心理框架的某些部分会不加区分地接纳它，只因它是一种鲜活的感觉。这种对痛苦刺激的默许，是意识本质的基本组成部分，且不可或缺。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: This is why psychological time seems to flow so easily when physical time is pursued and watched by a quiet "I". The one leads to the other and the camouflage is loose enough to let the inner form shine through. A proper use of psychological time will not only lead you into the inner world, but will also prevent you from being rushed in the physical world. Within it, that is within the framework of psychological time, you will discover a quiet and cool peacefulness. I tell you both this for your benefit, because both of you will gain much in the utilization of these added benefits.
quotes.translation: 这就是为何当物理时间被安静的"我"所追随与观察时，心理时间似乎如此顺畅地流动。两者相互引导，伪装变得松散，让内在形式得以显现。善用心理时间不仅会引领你进入内在世界，更能防止你在物质世界中被催促。在心理时间的框架内，你将发现一种宁静而清凉的平和。我告诉你们这些是为你们好，因为你们两人都能在运用这些额外益处时获得极大收获。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: In the same fashion, diseases also, in the overall picture, promote the health and well-being of life in all of its aspects. Value fulfillment operates within microbes and nations, within individual creatures and entire species, and it unites all of life's manifestations so that indeed creatures and their environments are united in an overall cooperative venture -- a venture in which each segment almost seeks to go beyond itself in creativity, growth, and expression. In a smaller, individual framework, each man and woman, then, is motivated by this same value fulfillment. Period.
quotes.translation: 同样地，疾病在整体图景中也促进生命所有层面的健康与福祉。价值完成运作于微生物与国家之间，运作于个体生物与整个物种之间，它统合所有生命的表现形式，使得生物与其环境确实在一个整体的合作性事业中联合——在这个事业中，每个部分几乎都试图在创造力、成长与表达上超越自身。从较小的个体框架来看，每个男人和女人都受这相同的价值完成所驱动。句号。
quotes.book: The Way Toward Health
quotes.source_file: 10-10-10-10The Way Toward Health - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (I talked about the first session for Jane's symptoms -- the private portion of Session 208, for November 15, 1965 -- yet she said that for her the whole thing really started the day before we went to a party in June 1966 regarding How to Develop Your ESP Power. Our friends wanted to celebrate the publication of her first "psychic" book, her first mention of Seth, but she read poetry at the party and wouldn't talk about the ESP book -- too embarrassed. A strange, protective way to behave.

quotes.text: I wanted to say a little more about duration, as far as communication from the inner senses are concerned. As I said, duration can be experienced in relation to psychological time and within its framework. The important thing here, and I'm afraid the difficult thing for you here, is the relaxation of the mind from clock time. And this is a freedom which you can and should allow yourself in such instances.
quotes.translation: 关于内在感官的沟通，我想再多谈一些"绵延"的概念。如我所言，绵延可以在心理时间及其框架内被体验。这里的关键——恐怕对你们而言是难点——在于让心智从钟表时间中放松。这是你们在这种情境下能够且应当允许自己获得的自由。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Now. This psychological framework is the medium through which we can communicate. It is purely a psychic organization that telepathically transmits concepts from me to Ruburt. We have always preferred the light trance state over a deeper trance for several reasons.
quotes.translation: 这个心理框架是我们得以沟通的媒介。它纯粹是一种心灵组织，通过心电感应将概念从我这里传递给鲁柏。我们始终偏好轻度出神状态而非深度出神，原因如下。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: The exercise will do much to override this, for you are strong enough and you need inner freedom. There is behind such seemingly undirected, abstract tumult and energy, direction that cannot be intellectually perceived, but can be intuitively sensed. And this is the force that is behind your own art and all creativity. (Pause.) It can even serve as a framework for creativity, for from these raw materials you can forge and direct energy for your own purposes. You can take that tumult and use it, but not if you set yourself up against it. Then, it is threatening to you.
quotes.translation: 这个练习将极大助你克服此点，因为你足够强大且需要内在自由。在这种看似漫无目的、抽象的骚动与能量背后，存在着无法被理智感知却能被直觉觉察的方向。这正是你艺术与所有创造力背后的力量。（停顿）它甚至可以作为创造力的框架，因为你可以从这些原始素材中锻造并引导能量为己所用。你可以接纳并运用那股骚动，但若你与之对抗，它就会对你构成威胁。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Consciousness is not dependent upon form, as I have said, and yet it always seeks to create form. We do not exist in any time framework as you know it. Minutes, hours, or years have lost both their meaning and their fascination. We are quite aware of the time situations within other systems, however, and we must take them into account in our communications. Otherwise what we say would not be understood.
quotes.translation: 如我所言，意识并不依赖形态，却始终寻求创造形态。我们并不存在于你们所知的任何时间框架中。分钟、小时或年份已失去其意义与吸引力。然而我们清楚其他系统内的时间状况，在沟通时必须将其纳入考量。否则我们所说的话将无法被理解。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: This is simply a matter of time and development. You will learn together. (Pause.) You are both Emotionally based individuals, and you will be open to each other's communications, which is all to the good. Your material will come in a slightly different manner, and the psychological framework that develops about you will be of a somewhat different nature than that which exists between Ruburt and myself.
quotes.translation: 这纯粹是时间与发展的问题。你们将共同学习。（停顿）你们都是情感导向的个体，会彼此敞开心扉沟通，这再好不过。你的材料会以略微不同的方式呈现，围绕你形成的心理框架，其性质将与鲁柏和我之间的框架有所不同。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Some of these will fall into the faster-than-light groupings, and have a perceivable vitality within that framework. These faster-than-light particles of course exist in their own kind of form then. There are many ranges and great varieties of such units, all existing beyond your perceivable reach. To lump them together in such a way, however, is misleading, for within all of this there is great order.
quotes.translation: 其中有些会落入超光速的范畴，并在该架构内具有可感知的生命力。这些超光速粒子当然以它们自己的形态存在。这类单位有许多范围和种类，全都存在于你们可感知的范围之外。然而，将它们如此笼统地归为一类会产生误导，因为这一切之中存在着极大的秩序。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Consider the spectacular framework of your body just from the physical standpoint. You perceive it as solid, as you perceive all other physical matter; yet the more matter is explored the more obvious it becomes that within it energy takes on specific shape (in the form of organs, cells, molecules, atoms, electrons), each less physical than the last, each combining in mysterious gestalt to form matter.
quotes.translation: 仅从物质角度来考虑你身体的惊人架构。你感知它为固态，如同你感知所有其他物质一样；然而，对物质探索得越多，就越明显的是，在物质内部，能量以特定形态呈现（以器官、细胞、分子、原子、电子的形式），每一个都比前一个更非物质，每一个都以神秘的完形结合形成物质。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: We are dealing here principally, and in the main, with the essence of action, and essentially all apparent divisions are arbitrary for the sake of explanation. The moment point is in itself arbitrary, an artificial division. As we have said, the moment point for you is actually composed of the amount of action which you are capable of assimilating within your present framework, for the moment point is indeed a portion of the spacious present.
quotes.translation: 我们这里主要是在处理行动的本质，基本上所有明显的划分都是为了解释而人为设定的。瞬间点本身就是人为的、武断的划分。如我们所说，对你而言的瞬间点实际上是由你当前架构内所能同化的行动量所组成，因为瞬间点确实是广袤现在的一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The main issue was the relative ease with which you were able to enlarge the hole in the glass door. Ease is the key word. To the world of the intellect, a glass door must be considered solid, as it is in the world of physical senses. In other quite as factual terms, indeed in the larger framework of facts, the door of course is not solid at all, as no objects are. Obviously that is known to science.
quotes.translation: 主要问题在于你能够相对轻松地扩大玻璃门上的洞。轻松是关键。对理智世界而言，玻璃门必须被视为固态，正如它在物质感官世界中那样。而在其他同样真实的角度上，实际上在事实的更大架构中，门当然根本不是固态的，正如没有物体是固态的一样。显然科学界已知这一点。
quotes.book: The Magical Approach
quotes.source_file: 10-09-10-09The Magical Approach_ Seth Spea - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Seth speaks in Session 826, held for Mass Events on March 8, 1978:

quotes.text: If in your waking hours you playfully make up a dream for yourself, and then playfully interpret it without worrying about implications, but for itself only, you will unwittingly touch upon the nature of your own nightly dreaming. Your regular dreams and your "manufactured" ones will have much in common, and the process of manufacturing dreams will acquaint you with the alterations of consciousness that to a greater degree happen nightly. This is an excellent exercise. It is particularly beneficial for those who have a too-rigid mental framework.
quotes.translation: 如果你在清醒时为自己编造一个梦境，然后轻松地诠释它，不担心其含义，只为梦境本身，你将无意中触及自己夜间梦境的本质。你平常的梦境和你"编造"的梦境会有许多共同之处，而编造梦境的过程会让你熟悉意识的变化，这些变化在夜间更大程度上发生。这是一个极好的练习。对于那些心智架构过于僵化的人尤其有益。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: (11:25.) This is a matter of psychological feeling. Some individuals are more at ease, more assured, and more capable working with others in this case. You could consider an analogy in which John Doe follows his kindergarten class all the way through high school. In a reincarnational situation, he would always choose to return with associates. Others, however, would rather skip from school to school, appearing alone, relatively speaking, with greater freedom, more challenge, but without the comforting framework of security chosen by the others.
quotes.translation: (11:25) 这是心理感受的问题。在这种情况下，有些人与他人合作时更自在、更自信、更有能力。你可以考虑一个类比：约翰·多伊从幼儿园一直跟班到高中。在转世情境中，他总会选择与同伴一起回来。而另一些人则宁愿在不同学校间跳来跳去，相对而言独自出现，拥有更大的自由、更多的挑战，但没有其他人所选择的舒适安全架构。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Some portion of each individual is in direct contact with the very source of its own existence. Each individual is innately aware that help is available in every situation, and that information does not need to come through the physical senses alone. Many illnesses are cured, then, through quite natural methods that not only involve physical healings, but bring into play other events -- events that have great bearing on the psychological elements that may be involved behind the scenes. For those interactions we will have to look to Framework 2.
quotes.translation: 每个个体都有部分与自身存在的源头直接相连。每个个体天生知晓在任何情境中都能获得帮助，且信息无需仅通过肉体感官传递。许多疾病因此通过相当自然的方式被治愈——这些方式不仅涉及身体疗愈，更会引发其他事件，这些事件对幕后可能涉及的心理要素具有重大影响。要探讨这些互动，我们必须看向架构二。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title:
SESSION 821, FEBRUARY 20, 1978
9:30 P.M. MONDAY
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: The impulse to be, in any terms that you can understand, is without beginning or end. What you have in your physical species are the manifestations of inner species of being, or creative groupings originated by consciousness as material patterns into which consciousness then flows. In those terms, the world came into being and the species appeared in a completely different framework of activity than is imagined, and one that cannot be scientifically established -- particularly within those boundaries with which science has protected itself.
quotes.translation: 以你所能理解的任何说法而言，"存在"的冲动无始无终。你们物质物种所呈现的，是内在存在物种的显化，或是由意识创生的创造性组合——这些组合作为物质模式，意识随后注入其中。就此而言，世界由此诞生，物种出现在一个与想象截然不同的活动架构中，这个架构无法被科学证实——尤其无法在科学自我设限的边界内被证实。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title:
SESSION 872, AUGUST 8, 1979
9:15 P.M. WEDNESDAY
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: I want to mention that while form is not a characteristic of matter, it is one of the characteristics of consciousness. The form which consciousness takes is usually composed of matter on your plane. The form perceived by your outer senses is always composed of matter, of course. There are also however forms or structures that are what you may call psychological forms or structures, even within your own field, which you do not perceive with your outer senses, but which are nevertheless frameworks that underlie form as it appears in matter.
quotes.translation: 我想指出，虽然形态并非物质的特性，却是意识的特性之一。意识所采取的形态在你们层面通常由物质构成。你们外在感官感知到的形态当然始终由物质构成。然而，即便在你们自身领域内，也存在可称为心理形态或结构的形态结构——你们无法用外在感官感知，但它们却是物质形态显现时潜藏其下的架构。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: You must understand that in any way your situation, and any that you know of physical reality, is highly artificial. It is the mass creation formed by your inner ideas. The time concept is but one example, and it is responsible for many of your most cherished misconceptions. You must form ideas into physical materiaizationl in order to recognize the force behind the ideas you are learning to use and understand. However such materializations are only necessary at certain levels. The time scheme appears valid only within that framework.
quotes.translation: 你必须明白，你的处境以及你所知的任何物质实相，在任何层面上都是高度人为的。它们是由你内在观念形成的大规模创造。时间概念仅是其中一例，它导致了许多你最珍视的误解。你必须将观念转化为物质显化，才能认清你正在学习运用与理解的观念背后的力量。然而，这种显化只在特定层面必要。时间架构仅在该框架内看似有效。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The framework of sex is another natural therapeutic system if you have not already hampered its effectiveness by contrary beliefs. Natural "mystical" experience, unclothed in dogma, is the original religious therapy that is so often distorted in ecclesiastical organizations, but it represents man's innate recognition of his oneness with the source of his own being, and of his own experience.
quotes.translation: 性别的架构是另一套自然疗愈系统——前提是你尚未用矛盾信念阻碍其效力。剥除教条外衣的自然"神秘"体验，是常被教会组织扭曲的原始宗教疗愈，但它代表着人类对自身与存在源头及个人体验合一性的先天认知。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Now: This does not mean that you will necessarily have a flood of reincarnational information, instant intuitive recognition of "past" lives, or experience any such intrusive data. It does mean that in your own life such information automatically appears in intimate ways, but couched within the framework of your own comprehensions, even passing unobtrusively through your conscious thoughts.
quotes.translation: 现在：这并不意味着你必然会遭遇大量转世信息、对"前世"的即时直觉认知，或经历任何此类侵入性数据。这确实意味着，在你自己的生命中，这类信息会以亲密方式自动呈现——但会包裹在你自身理解的框架内，甚至悄然流过你的意识思维。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: In the dreaming state the characteristics of the reasoning mind become altered, and from a waking viewpoint it might seem distorted in its activity. What actually happens, however, is that in the dreaming state you are presented with certain kinds of immediate knowledge. It often appears out of context in usual terms. It is not organized according to the frameworks understood by the reasoning portions of your mind, and so to some extent in dreams you encounter large amounts of information that you cannot categorize.
quotes.translation: 在梦境状态中，理性心智的特性会发生变化，从清醒视角来看，其活动可能显得扭曲。然而实际发生的是，在梦境状态中你接收到某种直接知识。这些知识通常以惯常术语来看显得脱离语境，它并非按照你理性心智所理解的框架来组织，因此在某种程度上，你在梦中会遇到大量无法归类信息。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Basically, however, no system is closed. Energy flows freely from one to another, or rather permeates each. It is only the camouflage structure that gives the impression of closed systems, and the law of inertia does not apply. It appears to be a reality only within your own framework and because of your limited focus.
quotes.translation: 但根本上，没有系统是封闭的。能量自由地从一处流向另一处，更确切地说，它渗透着每个系统。只有伪装结构才给人以封闭系统的印象，而惯性定律并不适用。它只在你们自己的框架内，且因你们受限的焦点才显得真实。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: This is not as far-fetched as it might seem, for again, you perceive now more than you realize; although you may not be consciously aware of this, it still falls within the framework of your associated experience. The mere shaking of a hand may be perceived by you as a simple action. You are not consciously aware of the million small actions which make up this seemingly insignificant act.
quotes.translation: 这并不像表面看来那样牵强，因为再次强调，你现在感知到的比你以为的更多；虽然你可能没有意识到这一点，但它仍属于你关联经验的框架。仅仅一次握手，你可能将其视为简单动作。你并未有意识地觉察到构成这个看似微不足道行为的百万个细微动作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: It is important that it be understood that suggestion, as you know it, is but the manifestation of inner flows and inner directions. Without the inward flows and directions, it goes without saying that action would indeed involve itself in chaotic disorders, without constructive patterns or materializations. It would instead entangle itself within the power of its own energy, and be unable to form any long-lasting patterns or frameworks within which fulfillments and fairly permanent constructions could be formed.
quotes.translation: 重要的是要理解，你们所知的暗示，不过是内在流动与内在方向的显化。没有内在流动与方向，行动无疑会陷入混乱无序，无法形成建设性模式或物质化。它反而会纠缠于自身能量的力量中，无法形成任何持久模式或框架，以在其中构建成就与相对恒久的构造。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

source_raw.title: （In Volume I of The Early Sessions this sensation, as I call it, is dealt with following Session 23, in Session 24, and following Session 25, among others. I have experienced it frequently during psychological time since then. It is much richer and more varied than the more usual thrilling one notes upon a moving occasion. In the above instance, the initial source of the sensation appeared to stem from outside the body, and the waves against my ears had a tangible, solid quality that is difficult to describe.

quotes.text: Give us a moment ... (Humorously, to me:) You are the living version of yourself in space and time, around which your world revolves.11 The great potentiality that exists in the unknown self, however, also actualizes other such focuses, and in the same space-time framework. They are not you, any more than you are the black man, or the white woman, or the Indian woman, or the Chinese man.
quotes.translation: 请稍等片刻……（幽默地，对我说：）你是时空中的活生生的自己，你的世界围绕你旋转。然而，未知自我中存在的巨大潜能，也在同一时空框架中实现了其他此类焦点。他们不是你，正如你不是那位黑人男子、白人女子、印度女子或中国男子。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Of itself (underlined), however, it will not carry you further than this. Of itself, it will not give you insight into past lives or future existences. Of itself it will not lift you out of the framework of the physical system, but merely allow you to see that system as it is. It will allow you to experience your relationship with the system, and the system's relationship with the whole.
quotes.translation: 但就其本身（下划线强调）而言，它不会带你超越此点。就其本身而言，它不会让你洞见前世或未来存在。就其本身而言，它不会将你提升出物质系统的框架，而只让你看到该系统本来的面目。它将让你体验你与系统的关系，以及系统与整体的关系。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: You may ask how real are those other existences, but if so you must ask in whose terms. Existence has a physical version. In that framework you are born and die, and in a definite sequence. Death is a physical reality. It is real, however, only in physical terms. If you accept those terms as the only criterion of reality then surely it appears that death is an end to your consciousness.
quotes.translation: 你或许会问那些其他存在有多真实，但若如此你必须问以谁的术语为准。存在具有物质版本。在那个架构中你出生与死亡，并遵循明确的序列。死亡是物质实相。然而它只在物质层面是真实的。若你接受这些术语作为实相的唯一标准，那么死亡显然看似是你意识的终结。

quotes.text: Those with other intents will find excuses to leave such areas. There will be, perhaps, a chance meeting that will result in a hasty trip. On a hunch someone else might suddenly leave the area to find a new job, or decide to visit a friend in another state. Those whose experiences do not merge with nature's in that regard will not be part of that mass event. They will act on information that comes to them from Framework 2. Those who stay also act on the same information, by choosing to participate.
quotes.translation: 怀有其他意图者会找到离开这类区域的借口。或许会有场偶然相遇导致仓促旅行。凭直觉另有人可能突然离开该地去寻找新工作，或决定拜访外州的朋友。那些经验未与大自然在此方面融合者，将不会参与这场群体事件。他们会依据来自架构二的信息行动。留下的人同样依据相同信息行动——只是选择了参与。

quotes.text: Now: To some extent or another there are counterparts12 of all realities within your psyche. When you slow down, or quicken your thoughts or your perceptions, you automatically begin to alter your focus, to step aside from your officially recognized existence. This is highly important, for in certain terms you are indeed transcending the time framework that you imagine to be so real.
quotes.translation: 现在：在某种程度上，你心灵内存在着所有实相的对等物。当你放慢或加快思绪或感知时，你便自动开始改变焦点，从官方认可的存在中抽身。这极为重要，因为从某些层面而言，你确实正在超越你想象中如此真实的时间架构。

quotes.text: You alter your experience in each instant, quite drastically. Each individual possesses far vaster opportunities for choice than are realized. You are denied tomorrow's wisdom only because you believe time is a closed system.14 It is true that you are subject to birth and death, yet within that framework far greater dimensions of experience are possible than are usually experienced.
quotes.translation: 你在每个瞬间都相当剧烈地改变着经验。每个个体拥有的选择机会远大于其认知。你被剥夺明日智慧，只因你相信时间是封闭系统。诚然你受制于出生与死亡，但在此架构内，可能体验到的经验维度远比通常经历的更为广阔。

quotes.text: There may be the appearance of a time lapse of one kind or another between mental actions and their appearance or projection into other systems, but this is a distortive effect. Such distortive effects, such distortions, are often correlated within a given system, and accepted as a foundation for the nature of reality. And all further data is then accepted according to the easiness with which it can be accepted within this framework, the distortions being mistaken for the actuality behind them.
quotes.translation: 在心理行动与其显现或投射到其他系统之间，可能存在某种时间差现象，但这是一种扭曲效应。此类扭曲效应常被关联到特定系统中，并被接受为实相本质的基础。所有后续数据便根据其在此架构内被接纳的难易程度而被接受，而扭曲被误认为其背后的实相。

quotes.text: Now to return to our discussion. The matter of time is highly important if you have any hopes of understanding the self in its entirety, or other personalities that do not operate within your system. The Psychological frameworks are so different. The apparent cause and effect sequence is absent, and identity knows itself as itself through other means than continuity, in your terms.
quotes.translation: 现在回到我们的讨论。时间问题至关重要，如果你希望理解完整的自我，或理解那些不在你们系统内运作的其他人格。心理架构如此不同。明显的因果序列并不存在，而身份认同通过连续性之外的其他方式认识自身——以你们的说法而言。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Association or no, physically you will remember events in time, with present moments neatly following past ones. The psyche deals largely with associative processes, however, as it organizes events through association. Time as such has little meaning in that framework. Associations are tied together, so to speak, by emotional experience. In a large manner, the emotions defy time.
quotes.translation: 无论有无联想，在物质层面你们会按时间顺序记忆事件，当下时刻整齐地跟随过去时刻。然而心灵主要处理联想过程，它通过联想组织事件。时间本身在那个架构中意义甚微。可以说，联想通过情感体验联结在一起。从广义上讲，情感超越了时间。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche

quotes.text: You (both) are studying the nature of creativity as few others have done or can do--and that is bound to make possible new creative frameworks, and to offer new solutions to situations that cause difficulty only within smaller frameworks.
quotes.translation: 你们（两人）正在研究创造力的本质，这是鲜有人能做到或能够做到的——这必然使新的创造性架构成为可能，并为那些仅在较小架构内造成困境的情境提供新的解决方案。

source_raw.title: We held the session in the living room, as usual. Jane yawned, then laughed as we waited for Seth to come through. "I keep trying to change that title, though...." After a prolonged juggling of titles and themes on her own, she'd finally acquired the book's title directly from Seth some seven weeks ago, or shortly before July 30, 1979; see the closing note for Session 869 in Chapter 10 of Mass Events. "I just think that 'value fulfillment' is a strange phrase to use in a book title," Jane said. "It's too unfamiliar--I'm afraid it'll confuse the reader. I keep thinking of something simpler, like Dreams and Evolution: A Seth Book. And without 'Evolution' being in quotes, too. Or how about Dreams, Evolution, and Creativity ...?"
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 6: Genetic Heritage and Reincarnational Predilections

quotes.text: Lack of this last factor can cause a personality to be reborn more times on your plane than would be necessary if only the role requirement operated. This requirement for fullest use of capabilities has nothing to do with opportunity in the social sense, although of course the particular social framework will have much to do with the particular development of certain abilities.
quotes.translation: 缺乏这最后一个因素，可能导致人格在你们层面转世更多次，而如果仅凭角色要求运作，本无需如此。这种对能力最充分运用的要求与社会意义上的机会无关，尽管特定的社会架构当然会与某些能力的特定发展密切相关。

quotes.text: This reassembled ego then attempts to perceive these concepts in terms of sense perceptions, which are sent as communications to the physical individual at the other end. Sometimes the communications are made directly, though they must be sifted through the subconscious of the physical individual. When the physical individual is trained along these lines however, he helps in this process, and a psychological framework, like a bridge, is erected that serves to connect the two personalities.
quotes.translation: 这个重组后的自我随后试图以感官知觉的方式感知这些概念，这些知觉作为通讯被发送给另一端的物质个体。有时通讯是直接进行的，尽管它们必须通过物质个体的潜意识过滤。然而，当物质个体沿着这些方向受过训练时，他会协助这一过程，于是一座像桥梁般的心理架构被建立起来，用以连接这两个人格。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: The dream state provides you with a trial framework in which you explore probable actions and decide upon the ones you want to physically materialize. Not only nightmares, as mentioned earlier (in the last session), but many other dreams follow rhythms of a therapeutic nature far more effectively than any that are drug-induced. Sleeping pills can interfere with this activity.
quotes.translation: 梦境状态为你提供了一个试验性架构，在其中你探索可能的行为，并决定哪些是你想要在物质层面实现的。如前所述（上次课中），不仅噩梦，许多其他梦境也遵循治疗性质的节奏，其效果远胜任何药物诱导的梦境。安眠药会干扰这种活动。

quotes.text: There are in fact infinite varieties of matter, existing in what you would call (underlined) one space framework. Using the physical senses, you can of course never perceive the existence of these other systems. Advanced training with the inner senses can lead to such explorations however. Your friend is more advanced--his system is more advanced than yours in this respect.
quotes.translation: 事实上存在着无限种类的物质，存在于你们所谓的（划线）同一空间架构内。使用物质感官，你们当然永远无法感知这些其他系统的存在。然而，通过内在感官的高级训练，可以导向这类探索。你的朋友更为先进——他的系统在这方面比你的更先进。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: These arts are useless if they are not practiced -- useless in that they lie ever latent, that they are not brought out into the exterior framework of your world. To use these arts requires first of all the knowledge that beneath the world you know is another; that alongside the focus of consciousness with which you are familiar there are other focuses quite as legitimate.
quotes.translation: 这些技艺若不实践便毫无用处——无用之处在于它们始终潜伏着，未被带入你们世界的外在架构。运用这些技艺首先需要知道：在你们所知的世界之下还有另一个世界；在你们熟悉的意识焦点旁边，存在着同样合法的其他焦点。

quotes.text: In the past because of Ruburt's own difficulties, I merely hinted at future developments. I will tell you now however that within our own framework of sessions, and with what I call contact sessions with others, other books will materialize. There will be several in which the basic principles will be given simply, directly, with many examples to the ordinary man and woman.
quotes.translation: 过去由于鲁柏自身的困难，我只是暗示未来的发展。然而现在我要告诉你们，在我们自己的课业架构内，以及在我所谓的与他人接触的课程中，其他书籍将会具体化。会有几本书以简单直接的方式阐述基本原则，并附上许多给普通男女的实例。

quotes.text: Such developments would mean the releasing and availability of added energy into your field, that would have endless possibilities in all directions. Ideas and concepts are nonphysical actualities that attract unaligned energy, direct and concentrate it. The dream world exists more closely in that spacious present of which the inner self is so aware. It is not as involved with camouflage constructions as your own universe, and its actions are somewhat limited within its own framework.
quotes.translation: 这类发展意味着将额外能量释放并注入你们的场域，这将产生各个方向无穷的可能性。观念与概念是非物质的实相，它们吸引未定向的能量，引导并集中它。梦境世界更贴近地存在于那个内在自我如此觉察的广阔当下。它不像你们自己的宇宙那样涉及伪装建构，其活动在其自身架构内也稍受限制。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The present medical profession is sadly hampered because of its own beliefs. Often it operates as a framework in which poor health and disease are not only accepted as normal, but the concepts behind them strengthened. Here you have again, as in psychoanalysis, a hide-and-seek arrangement in which both doctor and patient take part. (See the 616th session in Chapter Two.)
quotes.translation: 当前的医学界因其自身信念而可悲地受到阻碍。它常常运作于一个架构中，其中不良健康和疾病不仅被视为正常，而且其背后的概念还被强化。这里你们再次看到，如同精神分析学中，一种医生和病人都参与的捉迷藏安排。（见第二章第616节。）
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Your home station1 does not simply present programming for you to view. Instead you help create the program, of course, even while you are part of it. On any given afternoon certain elements of experience will be "given," roughly sketched in. There are certain cues to set the stage, colon: It may be a snowy, humid, or dry and sunny day, for instance; the location may be city or town. Yet within that loose framework you create the program of the day according to your own world view.
quotes.translation: 你们的家庭电台并非仅仅提供节目供你们观看。相反，你们帮助创造节目，当然，即使你们是节目的一部分。在任何给定的下午，某些经验元素会被"给予"，粗略地勾勒出来。有某些线索来设定场景，比如：可能是下雪、潮湿或干燥晴朗的日子；地点可能是城市或小镇。然而，在那个松散的架构内，你们根据自身世界观创造当天的节目。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Now: Dictation: There are natural feedback systems within the body and psyche that operate to set up optimum frameworks of balance, in which your growth and development can take place. There is some difference here, which was mentioned earlier (in the 636th session in Chapter Nine), between you and the animals and the particular way in which you create your reality ...

quotes.text: Dictation: You must understand that in a manner of speaking, Framework 2 is on the one hand an invisible version of the physical universe. On the other hand, however, it is far more than that, for it contains within it probable variations of that universe -- from the most cosmic scale, say, down to probable versions of the most minute events of any given physical day.
quotes.translation: 口授：你必须明白，从某种意义上说，框架二一方面是物质宇宙的无形版本。但另一方面，它远不止于此，因为它包含了该宇宙的可能变体——从最宏大的宇宙尺度，直至任何特定物理日子里最细微事件的可能版本。

quotes.text: You pay little heed, however. You think that this is just your "imagination." The unknown reality is alive in your own psyche. There are hints of it in all of your experience. You would not be alive, in your terms, if first you did not imagine yourself as you are. Play is, in fact, one of the most practical methods of survival, both individually and for the species. Within its framework lie the secrets of creativity, and within the secrets of creativity lie the secrets of being.
quotes.translation: 然而你很少留意。你认为这只是你的“想象”。未知的实相活跃于你自身的心灵中。它在你所有经验中都留有线索。以你的说法，若你未曾先想象自己如你所是，你根本不会活着。事实上，游戏无论对个体还是物种而言，都是最实用的生存方法之一。在其框架内隐藏着创造力的秘密，而在创造力的秘密中则隐藏着存在的秘密。

quotes.text: No system is a closed system. The framework of all systems is basically infinite. Any appearance of enclosure is the result of camouflage distortions, quite necessary within a given system so that the organisms within it can focus their main attentions to the problems within a particular system.
quotes.translation: 没有系统是封闭系统。所有系统的框架本质上是无限的。任何封闭的表象都是伪装扭曲的结果——这在特定系统内是必要的，以便其中的生物能将主要注意力集中于该特定系统内的问题。

quotes.text: In those frameworks you have made certain classifications that now appear quite obvious. Common sense upholds them, and it seems impossible to consider reality otherwise. Yet by their nature such categories structure your experience of reality itself to such an extent that any alternate ways of perceiving life seem not only untrustworthy, but completely impossible.
quotes.translation: 在这些框架中，你已做出某些如今看似显而易见的分类。常识支持它们，似乎不可能以其他方式思考实相。然而，这类范畴按其本质如此深刻地结构了你对实相本身的体验，以至于任何感知生命的替代方式不仅显得不可信赖，而且完全不可能。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Ruburt I believe once wrote a poem in which he stated, much more poetically indeed, that pain was deeper than a lake or a river; and this type of depth is that to which I refer here. There are perspectives of which you know relatively little, and they in turn are frameworks, forming physical constructions, actual physical constructions, which you do not perceive.
quotes.translation: 我相信鲁柏曾写过一首诗，诗中他以更富诗意的方式表达，痛苦比湖泊或河流更深；我在此所指的正是这种深度。有些视角你们所知甚少，而这些视角本身便是架构，形成你们无法感知的物质结构——实际存在的物质结构。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: As these changes come about, new areas will be activated in the brain to physically take care of them. Physically then, brain mappings will be possible in which past-life memories are evoked. All of these alterations are spiritual changes in which the meaning of religion will escape organizational bounds, become a living part of individual existence, and where psychic frameworks rather than physical ones form the foundations for civilization. (Pause, eyes closed, at 11:05.)
quotes.translation: 随着这些变化的发生，大脑中将激活新的区域来从物质层面处理它们。因此从物质层面而言，将可能绘制出能唤起前世记忆的大脑图谱。所有这些改变都是灵性上的转变，宗教的意义将挣脱组织框架的束缚，成为个体存在的鲜活部分，而灵性架构而非物质架构将成为文明的基础。（停顿，闭眼，11:05。）

quotes.text: (Slowly at 4:44.) Give us a moment ... When I am "present," this also places Ruburt within a different kind of framework in relation to himself, in which most negativity simply takes no hold. It is as if you set up a small healing station, or platform and from that vantage point the body is then able to use its healing abilities far more effectively than usual.
quotes.translation: （4:44缓慢地）稍等片刻……当我"临在"时，这也将鲁柏置于一种与自身相关的不同架构中，在此架构中大多数负面性根本无法立足。这就像设立了一个小型疗愈站或平台，从这个有利位置，身体便能比平时更有效地运用其疗愈能力。

(With more humor.)

quotes.text: Yet these projections or effects from your dimension into others, and from other dimensions into your own, do cause definite reactions within the plane in which they occur; and various attempts will be made, and are made to interpret them, but always within the framework of accepted, known phenomena. Therefore such attempts in this manner are doomed to failure.
quotes.translation: 然而，这些从你们维度投射到其他维度、或从其他维度投射到你们维度的投影或效应，确实会在它们发生的层面内引起明确反应；人们会做出各种尝试——并且正在做出尝试——去解读它们，但始终局限于被接受的已知现象框架内。因此，以这种方式进行的尝试注定失败。

quotes.text: Again physically speaking, you will find nothing to contradict these assumptions, since physically to you they are all that you can experience or perceive. These root assumptions are the framework of your camouflage system. As you attempt to explore other realities you almost automatically interpret such data in terms of the root assumptions of your own system.
quotes.translation: 再从物质层面来说，你们找不到任何与这些假设相矛盾的事物，因为对你们而言，物质层面就是你们所能体验或感知的一切。这些根本假设正是你们伪装系统的架构。当你们试图探索其他实相时，几乎会自动用自身系统的根本假设来解读这类资料。

quotes.text: When the pulsation is weak you call it past, when it is strongest you name it present, and the one that seems to you not yet as strong as present, you name future. For you make the divisions yourselves, and in such a manner have made the framework and all the possibilities, potentials and limitations inherent within a system set up with a divided time system.
quotes.translation: 当脉动微弱时你们称之为过去，当它最强时你们称之为现在，而那个在你们看来尚未如现在般强烈的，你们称之为未来。因为你们自己做出了这些划分，并以此方式构建了架构，以及一个建立在分裂时间系统内的所有可能性、潜能与局限。

quotes.text: It does mean that action is turned into channels that are not to the best interests of the whole personality. The energies appear concentrated and turn inward, affecting the whole system. They represent offshoots, again not necessarily detrimental in themselves, but only when viewed from the standpoint of the other actions that form the personality framework.
quotes.translation: 这确实意味着行动被导入不符合整体人格最佳利益的渠道。能量看似集中并转向内在，影响整个系统。它们代表旁支，本身未必有害，但只有从构成人格框架的其他行动角度来看才如此。

quotes.text: Surely investigation should be done to probe into this matter. In such a case negative ions form an electrical framework in which healing is possible. Such healing dreams come most often when the inner self deeply feels a sense of desperation, and automatically opens up channels from deeper layers of the self, that have been closed for all effective purposes.
quotes.translation: 当然应该对此事进行深入调查。在这种情况下，负离子形成一种可促成疗愈的电力框架。这种疗愈之梦最常出现在内在自我深感绝望之时，并自动开启自我深层中那些实际上早已封闭的通道。

quotes.text: If you use your head my friend, you can end up with a week that is well balanced, will meet both of your needs, will allow you to operate more effectively for this reason in all your endeavors. You will have a framework in your existence which is truly refreshing. The challenge and the opportunity is yours, but now is the time to initiate such a procedure.
quotes.translation: 朋友，你若善用头脑，便能安排出平衡的一周，满足双方需求，并因此更有效地投入所有努力。你的存在将拥有真正令人焕然一新的框架。挑战与机遇并存，但此刻正是启动此程序的时机。

quotes.text: There are various kinds and stages in such cases. Each individual is unique. Sometimes the framework includes another method of cure, in which portions of each conflicting side of the personality break off to form a clearer psychological structure which can communicate with the other two, act as a referee, and reconcile the opposing beliefs held by each.
quotes.translation: 此类情况存在多种类型与阶段。每个个体都是独特的。有时框架包含另一种疗愈方式：人格中相互冲突的各方会分裂出部分片段，形成更清晰的心理结构，该结构能与另外两方沟通，充当仲裁者，调和彼此对立的信念。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality

quotes.text: Since the source is not understood, no exterior manipulation in the social structure will be effective enough, and the person involved will see the problem personified in every issue. Hence, even improvements in the social framework will be "invisible" to the individual's perception -- not noticed. They will seem so minute in comparison with the problem.
quotes.translation: 由于根源未被理解，任何对社会结构的外部操控都将收效甚微，当事人会在每个议题中看到问题的人格化呈现。因此，即便社会框架有所改善，在个体的感知中也将"隐形"——不被察觉。与问题本身相比，这些改善显得微不足道。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Give us time ... There are, again, inner coordinates having to do with the inner behavior of electrons. If you understood these, then such travel could be relatively instantaneous. The coordinates that link you with others who are more or less of your kind have to do with psychic and psychological intersections that result in a like space-time framework.
quotes.translation: 请给我们时间……再次强调，存在与电子内在行为相关的内在坐标。若理解这些坐标，此类旅行便可相对瞬间完成。将你与同类者联结的坐标，涉及导致相似时空框架的心灵与心理交汇点。

quotes.text: The atoms and molecules that make up all physical cells are not basically bound by your time. They act within the framework of your time, but the condensed knowledge that they contain carries with it its own peculiar and unique consciousness, that is not bound by your physical laws.
quotes.translation: 构成所有物质细胞的原子和分子，本质上并不受你们时间的束缚。它们在你们的时间框架内运作，但所蕴含的浓缩知识携带着自身独特而专属的意识，这种意识不受你们物理法则的约束。

quotes.text: The reasoning mind is highly necessary, effective, and suitable for physical existence, and for the utilization of free will, which is very dependent upon perception of clearly distinguishable actions. In the larger framework of existence, however, it is simply one of innumerable methods of organizing data. A psychological filing system, if you prefer.
quotes.translation: 推理心智对物质存在及自由意志的运用极为必要、有效且适宜，而自由意志高度依赖于对清晰可辨行动的感知。然而，在更宏大的存在框架中，它不过是组织数据的无数方法之一——若你愿意，也可称之为一种心理归档系统。

quotes.text: There are many other conditions to be taken into consideration, for such diseases certainly do have strong social connections. They occur in social species. quotes.translation: 还有许多其他条件需纳入考量，因为这类疾病确实具有强烈的社会关联性。它们出现在社会性物种中。这绝不意味着它们必然具有传染性，而是说它们与个体及其社会、自然框架之间的互动存在整体性关联。

quotes.text: Since your physical time operates as it does, the physical organism does not have time within its own framework to experience any more than one probable event. It cannot focus upon two events at once. It goes without saying, again, that we are simplifying matters considerably, since each physical event is actually a gestalt of many small events.
quotes.translation: 由于你们的物理时间以现有方式运作，物理有机体在其自身框架内没有时间体验超过一个可能性事件。它无法同时聚焦于两个事件。毋庸赘言，我们再次大幅简化了问题，因为每个物理事件实际上都是众多微小事件的完形。

quotes.text: You had a hand in the development of your childhood environment. You chose the circumstances. This does not mean that you are at the mercy of those circumstances. It means that you set challenges to be overcome, set goals to be reached, set up frameworks of experience through which you could develop, understand and fulfill certain abilities.
quotes.translation: 你曾亲手参与塑造自己的童年环境。你选择了那些境遇。这并不意味着你受制于那些境遇，而是说你设定了待克服的挑战、待达成的目标，构建了可供你发展、理解并实现特定能力的经验框架。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: It is one thing to conceive of basic time as being outside of physical time, for the sake of making a point; but it must be realized that Priestley's time one, while only real to the ego, is nevertheless a part or a materialization that exists within this basic time framework, and the life force is at the same time within as well as without.
quotes.translation: 为了说明观点而构想基本时间存在于物理时间之外是一回事；但必须认识到，普里斯特利的时间一，虽然只对自我而言是真实的，却仍是这个基本时间框架内的一部分或一种物质化表现，而生命力同时存在于其内与外。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Now. Looking from your planet, outward as you think, at the quasars, your scientists believe that they look backward in space, in your terms. This is erroneous. quotes.text: (11:29.) The creative power to form your own experience is within you now, as it has been since the time of your birth and before. You may have chosen a particular theme for this existence, a certain framework of conditions, but within these you have the freedom to experiment, create, and alter conditions and events.
quotes.translation: （11:29）塑造自身经验的创造力此刻就在你之内，自你出生前便已存在。你或许为这一生选择了特定主题与某种条件框架，但在此范围内，你拥有实验、创造及改变条件与事件的自由。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The imagination always seeks expression. It is always creative, and underneath the frameworks of society it provides fresh incentives and new avenues for fulfillment, that can become harnessed through fanatical belief. When this happens your institutions become more repressive, and violence often emerges as a result.
quotes.translation: 想象力始终寻求表达。它永远具有创造性，在社会架构之下提供新鲜动力与实现的新途径——这些可能被狂热信仰所驾驭。当此情况发生时，你的体制会变得更具压迫性，暴力往往随之浮现。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title:
SESSION 829, MARCH 22, 1978 
9:30 P.M. WEDNESDAY
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: Because suggestions are formed of the same stuff that forms your physical reality, suggestions can indeed change the framework within which you operate. This is no Pollyanna hogwash. Many of the ways and the means have been given. My suggestions, if followed, will be fair enough proof of the validity of our material.
quotes.translation: 由于暗示由构成物质实相的同种材料形成，暗示确实能改变你运作的框架。这绝非盲目乐观的胡言。许多方法与途径早已给出。若遵循我的建议，将足以证明我们资料的有效性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

source_raw.title: （Tracing of the photographic negative used in the 7th envelope test, in Session 187, September 13,1965.）

quotes.text: This kind of experience has been familiar to me since early childhood. It is the cornerstone of my existence. Without it, or when I am not working generally within that framework, I become listless and sad. To some degree, I have that same sense of personal creativity now, as I write this introduction. It is "mine."
quotes.translation: 这类体验自幼便为我所熟悉，它是我存在的基石。若失去它，或当我未在此框架内运作时，便会变得无精打采、郁郁寡欢。此刻撰写这篇引言时，我仍保有某种程度的个人创造力。这创造力是"属于我的"。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Seth began dictating the book in our next Session 511, January 21, 1970, and finished it in Session 591, August 11, 1971. The intervening sessions did not all involve book dictation, however. Some were devoted to personal matters, some given for specific people who needed help, and some were in answer to philosophical questions not connected with the book. I also took several "little vacations." Despite such layoffs, Seth always picked right up, precisely where he left off dictation.

quotes.text: In larger terms, in the predream states you are aware of all of the activities of your own greater psyche as it participates in -- and contributes to -- the infinite existence of psychic consciousness as you understand it, and becomes aware of the psychological realities that form the framework of its own stability.
quotes.translation: 从更宏观的角度来看，在梦境前状态中，你意识到自己更大心灵的所有活动——它参与并贡献于你所理解的心灵意识的无限存在——并意识到构成其自身稳定性框架的心理实相。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: A young man can misuse and misunderstand his own abilities if they are stronger than the other personality frameworks that compose his identity. Many of your own experiences have strengthened your abilities. Your experiences did not prevent you from using them--the abilities--any more than they helped you form them.
quotes.translation: 一个年轻人如果自身能力比构成其身份的其他人格框架更强大，就可能误用和误解这些能力。你的许多经历增强了你的能力。这些经历既没有阻止你运用这些能力，也没有帮助你形成它们。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: You, dear reader, are in the process of expanding your psychic structure, [of] becoming a conscious participator with the soul, in certain terms, [of] becoming what your soul is. As cells multiply and grow -- within their own nature and the physical framework -- so do selves "evolve" in terms of value fulfillment.*
quotes.translation: 亲爱的读者，你正在扩展自己的心灵结构，在某种程度上成为灵魂的有意识参与者，成为你的灵魂所是的样子。如同细胞在其本性和物质框架内繁殖生长，自我也以价值完成的方式"进化"。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Within the basic framework of the body chosen before physical birth (for reasons that will be discussed later), the individual has full freedom to create a perfectly healthy functioning form. The form is, however, a mirror of beliefs, and will accurately materialize in flesh those ideas held by the conscious mind.
quotes.translation: 在出生前选择的身体基本框架内（原因将在后面讨论），个体拥有完全的自由来创造完全健康运作的形态。然而，形态是信念的镜子，会准确地将意识心所持有的那些观念物质化在肉身中。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: He could not accept a new framework, and he dared not let the old one go, so the symptoms became the physical materialization of these conflicts, and served many purposes. This child (in the photo), grown up in its own probability, has no such problems. The challenges are not there, either -- only in latent form.
quotes.translation: 他无法接受新框架，也不敢放弃旧框架，因此症状成为这些冲突的物质化显现，并服务于多种目的。这个孩子（照片中）在其自身概率中长大，没有此类问题。挑战也不存在——仅以潜在形式存在。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 679
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: Basic reality is not a chaos. It is a raw material. All diversity implies a whole, and if you theorize a whole then you must also imply diversity. These personality structures are like you a portion of basic reality, or All That Is. They are simply able to use and express and act within a larger framework of it.
quotes.translation: 基本实相并非混沌。它是原材料。所有多样性都暗示着一个整体，如果你理论化一个整体，那么你也必须暗示多样性。这些人格结构就像你一样，是基本实相或一切万有的一部分。它们只是能够在其中更大的框架内使用、表达和行动。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: You have believed that the natural contours of nature were somehow antagonistic to your own existence, so that left in the hands of nature alone you would lose your way. You have believed that in the very framework of your psychology. In your experiences, therefore, all of these things have largely proven true.
quotes.translation: 你们曾相信大自然天然的轮廓在某种程度上与你们自身的存在相敌对，因此若完全交由自然掌控，你们便会迷失方向。你们在自身心理架构的根基处便持有这种信念。因此在你们的经验中，所有这些事情大体上都已被证实为真。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-08-10-08Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_Tow - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: All That Is simultaneously and unendingly creates itself. Only within your particular frame of reference does there seem to be a contradiction between action that is simultaneous and yet unending. This has to do mainly with the necessary distortions arising from your time concept and the idea of duration; for duration to you presupposes existence continued within a time framework -- predisposing to beginnings and endings.
quotes.translation: 一切万有同时且无止境地创造着自身。只有在你们特定的参考架构内，同时性与无止境这两种行动之间才看似存在矛盾。这主要源于你们的时间概念及持续时长观念所导致的必要扭曲——对你们而言，持续时长预设了在时间框架内延续的存在，从而倾向于产生开端与终结。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The hunter, freed more or less from animal courtesy, would be forced to emotionally identify with his prey. To kill is to be killed. The balance of life sustains all. He must learn on a conscious level then what he knew all along. This is the intrinsic and only real meaning of guilt and its natural framework.
quotes.translation: 猎人若或多或少摆脱了动物的礼数，就不得不在情感上与猎物认同。杀戮即是被杀。生命的平衡维系着一切。他必须在意识层面学习他早已了然于心的道理。这便是罪咎本身固有的、唯一真实的意义及其自然框架。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: They formed the outer framework for the second dream. At the same time the dream generated sufficient energy to lift Ruburt and his moods from a slavery to physical events. That is, the dream allowed his native good spirits to return in force, and to operate in a healthy fashion regardless of physical events.
quotes.translation: 它们构成了第二个梦的外在框架。与此同时，这个梦产生了足够的能量，将鲁柏及其情绪从对物质事件的奴役中提升出来。也就是说，这个梦让他天生的好心情得以强势回归，并能够无视物质事件而以健康的方式运作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

source_raw.title: （Remembering her success in clairvoyantly tuning in on Bill Gallagher as he made his business errands on the evening of October 8, Jane decided to try the same thing with John on Tuesday. The difference here was that John had no forewarning of Jane's efforts, since she didn't get the idea until after he left us Monday. See Session 196 in Volume 4 for the Gallagher material.

quotes.text: In the time framework within which you now exist I can help you, but you cannot help me except by allowing me to help you, you see. In the gestalt which could develop we would be in a position of helping each other more equally. Now through you I affect physical reality, and this is indeed one of my purposes.
quotes.translation: 在你们现存的这个时间框架内，我可以帮助你们，但你们无法帮助我——除非通过允许我帮助你们，你们明白吗？在可能发展出的完形中，我们将能更平等地互相帮助。现在，通过你们，我影响着物质实相，而这确实是我的目的之一。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Every personality operates in this manner. These are simply his peculiar psychological necessities. This obviously does not mean he need never take time out. It does mean that his overall identity will not stand for a protracted period when concentration is not primarily locused within this work framework.
quotes.translation: 每个人格都以这种方式运作。这些只是他独特的心理需求。这显然并不意味着他永远不需要休息。这确实意味着，当他的专注力没有主要集中在这个工作框架内时，他的整体身份不会容忍这种状态持续过久。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Each child's birth changes the world, obviously, for it sets up an instant psychological momentum that begins to affect action in Framework 1 and Framework 2 alike.
quotes.translation: 每个孩子的出生都会改变世界，显然，因为这会在瞬间建立起一种心理动量，开始同时影响框架一和框架二中的行动。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title:
SESSION 827, MARCH 13, 1978
9:59 P.M. MONDAY
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: Death is not an end, but a transformation of consciousness. Nature, with its changing seasons, constantly brings you that message. In that light, and with that understanding, nature's disasters do not claim victims: Nature and man together act out their necessary parts in the larger framework of reality.
quotes.translation: 死亡并非终结，而是意识的转化。自然以其四季更迭不断向你传递这一讯息。基于这种认知与理解，自然灾难并非在夺走生命：自然与人类共同在更大的实相框架中扮演着必要的角色。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Regardless of your histories, those early men and women were quite healthy. They had strong teeth and bones. They dealt with the physical world through the purposeful use of the imagination, however, in a way now most difficult to understand. They realized they were mortal, and must die, but their greater awareness of Framework 2 allowed them a larger identification, so they understood that death was not only a natural necessity, but also an opportunity for other kinds of experience and development (see Note 1 for Session 803).
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: This transformation of energy should be quite comprehensible since you know that you subconsciously transform energy into physical, mental, creative or psychological states, manipulating it to your advantage. I have used the word "particle" to explain those units which are gateways and yet boundaries. While many are particles, this is only because they can be said to fall within the framework of your definition.
quotes.translation: 这种能量转化应当相当易于理解，因为你已知晓自己潜意识中将能量转化为物质、心智、创造或心理状态，并加以操控以利己用。我使用"粒子"一词来解释那些既是门户又是界限的单位。虽然许多单位是粒子，但这仅因它们可被纳入你定义的框架之内。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The Jonestown and Harrisburg incidents are indeed classic examples of the meeting places between private and public realities. I intend to deal with them in depth in The Individual and the Nature of Mass Events, where the background, particularly for Frameworks 1 and 2, has already been established.
quotes.translation: 琼斯镇与哈里斯堡事件确实是私人实相与公众实相交汇处的经典案例。我打算在《个人与群体事件的本质》中深入探讨它们，该书中已建立了尤其针对框架一与框架二的背景基础。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title:
SESSION 846, APRIL 4, 1979
9:30 P.M. WEDNESDAY
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: The writing ability would follow as its handmaiden. In this world the artistic abilities were put first, but the mystical nature was given greater chances to expand and develop. And both were given the opportunity and the challenge of shattering old, historic frameworks, and of rising beyond them.
quotes.translation: 写作能力将如侍女般随之而来。在此世界中，艺术才能被置于首位，但神秘本性获得了更广阔的扩展与发展空间。两者都获得了粉碎陈旧历史框架并超越其上的机遇与挑战。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 679
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: Events are not predestined. The framework for this emergence has already been set, however, within your system of probabilities. The emergence of this third personality will directly affect the original historical drama of Christ as it is now known. There is and must be interactions between them.
quotes.translation: 事件并非预先注定。然而，在你们的概率系统内，这种显现的框架已然设定。这第三人格的显现将直接影响目前所知的基督原始历史剧。它们之间存在着且必须存在互动。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Within the framework of your disciplined nature, you must allow now for more spontaneity. You will find it most rewarding in many ways. And the rewards will be reflected in your work. At the risk of a cliche, I must add here the ancient truth that only fear can hold you back, in any direction.
quotes.translation: 在你自律本性的框架内，现在必须允许更多自发性。你会发现这在许多方面都极具回报，而这些回报也将反映在你的工作中。即使冒着陈词滥调的风险，我也必须在此补充这个古老真理：唯有恐惧能在任何方向上阻碍你。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: It is also true however, in a completely different framework, that evil is of his own creation, at least evil as he thinks of it. And if a crime is to be assigned in humanity's terms, often the victim is as guilty as the murderer, in basic terms, in terms of guilt that no court can weigh.
quotes.translation: 然而在完全不同的框架中，同样真实的是——至少在他所认知的邪恶范畴内——邪恶乃其自身创造。若要以人类术语来定罪，从基本层面而言，从任何法庭都无法衡量的罪责层面来看，受害者往往与凶手同样有罪。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The dreamer is not aware of the actual passing of physical hours. He is only aware of the interior time element as it appears within the framework of his dream. The personality will be seen to operate in some manners that would be considered quite normal, if he were in the waking state.
quotes.translation: 做梦者并不察觉实际物理时间的流逝，他只感知到在其梦境框架内显现的内在时间元素。若处于清醒状态，人格的某些运作方式会被视为完全正常。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

source_raw.title: （Tracing of the photographic negative used in the 7th envelope test, in Session 187, September 13,1965.）

quotes.text: As a personality learns to use its abilities it becomes more aware of complexity, and able to operate as an identity within it. Since I have known your time it is meaningful for me, though it no longer hampers me. I merely understand its reality for you. Other psychological structures have not been initially aware of this peculiar relationship between your physical framework and your time concept.
quotes.translation: 当人格学会运用自身能力时，会愈发觉察到复杂性，并能在其中作为本体运作。既然我已认知你们的时间概念，这对我便具有意义——尽管它不再束缚我，我仅理解它对你们而言的真实性。其他心理结构最初并未意识到你们物理框架与时间概念之间的特殊关联。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Dineen, denied the support of the framework she had chosen, would have to face the questions that she had projected there. But all of the inner difficulties can be resolved by understanding that you form your own reality, and that your point of power is in the present (with emphasis).
quotes.translation: 迪宁因失去所选择框架的支持，将不得不面对她投射在那里的问题。但所有内在困境都能通过理解"你创造自己的实相，你的力量之点就在当下"（强调）而获得解决。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

related_concepts.name_en: The point of power is in the present

quotes.text: In the terms that you can understand (underlined), all species that you are aware of (underlined) appeared more or less at once, because the mental patterns had peaked (gesturing). Their vitality was strong enough to form differentiation and cooperation within the framework of matter.
quotes.translation: 在你们能理解的术语中（划线强调），你们所知的所有物种（划线强调）几乎同时出现，因为心智模式已达巅峰（手势）。其生命力足够强大，得以在物质框架内形成分化与合作。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title:
SESSION 872, AUGUST 8, 1979
9:15 P.M. WEDNESDAY
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: As you come to understand the nature of your own beliefs, you can learn to use the dream state more effectively for your conscious purposes. It is one of the most efficient natural therapies, and the inner framework in which much of your physical body building actually takes place.
quotes.translation: 当你开始理解自身信念的本质，就能学会更有效地利用梦境状态达成有意识的目的。这是最有效的自然疗法之一，也是许多身体构建实际发生的内在框架。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: We have already spoken of psychic constructions, and we have said that physical shapes are built upon inner psychic frameworks. Emotions then, in their own realm unperceived by the outer senses, have their own solidity, shape, and it is from these that your expectations are formed.
quotes.translation: 我们已讨论过心灵建构，并说明物质形态是建立于内在心灵框架之上。情感在其不为外在感官所感知的领域中，自有其坚实性与形态，而你的期待正是由此形成。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: What is imaginary is not true: You are taught this as children. The imagination, however, brings you into connection with a different kind of truth, or a different framework in which experience can be legitimately perceived. The larger truths of the psyche exist in that dimension.
quotes.translation: 想象并非真实——你从小就被这样教导。然而，想象却让你连接另一种真实，或另一种能合理感知经验的框架。心灵更宏大的真理存在于那个维度。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: In no time experiences are far more direct. Words in your terms are not needed to describe them. In no time is the energy that provides the basis for time as you presently experience it. All individuals and consciousness cooperatively form and sustain the frameworks that you know.
quotes.translation: 无时态的经验更为直接。用你的语言无需词汇描述。无时态的能量为你们当前体验的时间提供了基础。所有个体与意识共同协作，形成并维系着你们所知的框架。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The mass race consciousness, in its terms, possesses an identity. You are a portion of that identity while still being unique, individual and independent. You are confined only to the extent that you have chosen physical reality, and so placed yourself within its context of experience. While physical, you follow physical laws, or assumptions. These form the framework for corporeal expression.
quotes.translation: 就群体而言，大众种族意识拥有一个身份。你既是该身份的一部分，同时保持独特、个体且独立。你仅受限于选择物质实相的程度，因而将自己置于其经验脉络中。当处于物质状态时，你遵循物质法则或假设，这些构成了肉身表达的框架。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: A direct cognition is involved in which each consciousness knows what each other one is doing, its "position," and the implications of its experience. The entire fabric and framework of time and reality at each point is ascertained, and the probabilities probed and understood.
quotes.translation: 其中涉及直接认知——每个意识都知晓其他意识正在做什么、其"位置"以及经验的意涵。时间与实相的整个织体与框架在每个节点都被确认，概率被探查并理解。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Ruburt prepares himself in certain ways for our sessions. He forms a certain psychic and psychological framework, within which we operate. When there is question as to whether or not a particular session will be held, it is more difficult for him to make these preparations.
quotes.translation: 鲁柏会以特定方式为我们的课做准备。他会构建一个特定的心灵与心理架构，我们就在这个架构内运作。当某节课是否举行存在疑问时，他更难做好这些准备。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Again, I am not saying, "Do not give vitamins to children," for within your framework this becomes nearly mandatory. You will find more vitamins to treat more diseases. As long as the system works it will be accepted -- but the trouble is that it is not working very well.
quotes.translation: 我并非在说"不要给孩子吃维生素"，因为在你们的架构内，这几乎是必须的。你们会发现更多维生素来治疗更多疾病。只要这个体系运作，它就会被接受——但问题在于它运作得并不太好。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: While you believe in and experience the passage of time, then such questions will naturally occur to you, and in that fashion. Within that framework they make sense. When you begin to question the nature of time itself, then the "when" of the universe is beside the point.
quotes.translation: 当你们相信并体验时间流逝时，这类问题自然会以那种方式出现在你脑海中。在那个架构内，它们是有意义的。当你开始质疑时间本身的本质时，宇宙的"何时"就无关紧要了。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: A very small image, such as the square or rectangle on the item. An invitation to attend. A fence or framework connection with the item. Connection with a man also. With you and another man, and some connection with the date I 1492, perhaps leading to an historical event.
quotes.translation: 物品上非常小的图像，比如正方形或长方形。一份出席邀请。与物品相关的围栏或架构连接。也与一位男性有关。与你及另一位男性有关，并与日期1492年有些关联，或许指向某个历史事件。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Therefore, within this context you trust treat your living things gently. They are actualities within your system. Philosophical tenets at your level must be carefully filled in by constructive Emotions. There is strong value fulfillment to be gained where you are. It is good to know where you are, and the nature of your reality. You must still operate within its framework, however.
quotes.translation: 因此，在此脉络下，你们要温柔对待自己的生物。它们是你们系统内的实相。你们层面的哲学信条必须由建设性情感仔细填充。在你们所处之处，有强烈的价值完成可获。了解自己所在之处及自身实相的本质是好的。然而，你们仍必须在其架构内运作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Within this framework you have full freedom to create your experience, your personal life in all of its aspects, the living picture of the world. Your personal life, and to some extent your individual living experience, help create the world as it is known in your time.
quotes.translation: 在此架构内，你们拥有完全的自由去创造自己的经验、个人生活的所有面向，以及世界的鲜活画面。你们的个人生活，以及某种程度上你们个体的生活经验，帮助创造了你们时代所认知的世界。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: It is made vulnerable to all those forces it was meant to lead, while being stripped of its natural logical abilities -- indeed, of its very sense of identity. (Intently:) There is nothing exterior against which it can work, and no framework in which it can get balance.
quotes.translation: 它变得容易受所有那些它本应引领的力量影响，同时被剥夺了其自然的逻辑能力——事实上，甚至失去了自我认同感。（专注地：）没有任何外在的东西可供它运作，也没有任何架构能让它获得平衡。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Religious ecstasy does not need physical suffering as a stimulus, and such a means in the overall (underlined) will work against religious understanding. Those episodes, however, represent one of the ways in which man can actively seek suffering as a means to another end, and it is beside the point to say that such activity is not natural, since it exists within nature's framework.
quotes.translation: 宗教狂喜不需要以身体痛苦作为刺激，而这样的手段从整体（强调）来看会阻碍宗教理解。然而，这些事件代表了人类主动寻求痛苦作为达到另一目的的方式之一，说这种活动不自然是没有意义的，因为它存在于自然的架构之内。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: This is merely an analogy but it will explain your body's concept of itself; for as a whole it knows it "dies," as now its portions do, but is also aware of its "future" transformation. Within this framework it protects and maintains its own stability and survival.
quotes.translation: 这只是一个类比，但能解释你身体对自身的概念；因为作为一个整体，它知道自己会"死亡"，就像现在它的部分会死亡一样，但也意识到自己的"未来"转化。在这个架构内，它保护并维持自身的稳定与生存。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: This gives you a workable framework within which you can operate. Generally speaking it means that the same symbols will have similar meanings to you both. The same of course applies to Ruburt and myself. I have tried to answer some of your questions in my own way.
quotes.translation: 这给了你一个可行的架构，让你可以在其中运作。一般来说，这意味着相同的符号对你们两人会有相似的含义。当然，这也适用于鲁柏和我自己。我试图以自己的方式回答你的一些问题。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Man thinks as naturally as the birds fly. He looks at physical reality for the rest of physical reality: He is earth coming alive to view itself through conscious eyes--but that consciousness is graced to be because it is so intimately a part of earth's framework.
quotes.translation: 人类思考就像鸟儿飞翔一样自然。他透过物质实相来看待物质实相的其他部分：他是大地通过有意识的眼睛来观看自己的觉醒——但那种意识之所以被赋予恩典，是因为它如此亲密地成为大地架构的一部分。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: This psychological framework obviously must be receptive. It must also be formed by portions of my own essence, and by portions of Ruburt's personality. It can be thought of almost as a psychological protrusion, though this is not precisely the word to explain it.
quotes.translation: 这个心理架构显然必须具有接纳性。它也必须由我本质的部分和鲁柏人格的部分共同形成。它几乎可以被视为一种心理延伸，尽管这不是解释它的精确词汇。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: It is vital for the proper workings of genetic systems. It is a prerequisite for individual health and for the overall vitality of any given "stock." Your greatest achievements have been produced by civilizations during those times when man had the greatest faith in the meaningfulness of life in general, and in the meaningfulness of the individual within life's framework.
quotes.translation: 这对遗传系统的正常运作至关重要。它是个人健康及任何特定“种群”整体活力的先决条件。你们最伟大的成就，产生于人类对生命普遍意义、以及个体在生命架构内意义最具信念的那些文明时期。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-08-10-08Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_Tow - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: At certain levels both cat and mouse understand the nature of the life-energy they share, and are not -- in those terms -- jealous for their own individuality ... Man, pursuing his own way, chose to step outside of that framework -- on a conscious level....
quotes.translation: 在特定层面上，猫和老鼠都理解它们共享的生命能量本质，并且——就那些层面而言——不会嫉妒各自的个体性……人类遵循自己的道路，选择在意识层面上走出那个架构……
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (FOR SESSION 705)
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: The outer personality must be a strong yet resilient framework, able to dispense with its boundaries and allow the inner self its freedom, and yet strong enough to spring back and maintain its control over outward experience. This is certainly a discipline.
quotes.translation: 外在人格必须是一个强大而富有弹性的架构，既能舍弃其边界让内在自体获得自由，又足够强韧能弹回并维持对外在经验的控制。这无疑是一种纪律。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: The reality and the framework within which these sessions exist have electrical and chemical organizations also, that require a delicate focus that was upset this evening. It is simply more difficult then for Ruburt to make the necessary inner adjustments.
quotes.translation: 这些课程存在的实相与架构也具有电性和化学组织，需要精微的聚焦，而今晚这个聚焦被打乱了。因此鲁柏更难做出必要的内在调整。

quotes.text: It may even improve. Since I have said that expectations are formed by the emotions, then it is obviously the basic emotions themselves that must be manipulated, since the expectations are the frameworks formed by the emotions. This is the starting point.
quotes.translation: 它甚至可能改善。既然我说过期望由情绪形成，那么显然必须操控的是基本情绪本身，因为期望是由情绪形成的架构。这就是起点。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Now. Our object is a small framework （pause）, small as if made of match-sticks. It is light （pause）, and miniature, and formed of squares. I do not believe it is solid all the way through, but with open spaces in it. Some of the square shapes may be open.
quotes.translation: 现在。我们的物体是一个小架构（停顿），小得像火柴棍做的。它很轻（停顿），是微缩的，由方形构成。我不认为它是实心的，中间有开放空间。有些方形可能是镂空的。

quotes.text: The personality, again, looks at the nature of experience in its purest terms. In some previous civilizations this was done within a natural framework (pause), in which the old were cared for physically while their words were listened to most carefully.
quotes.translation: 人格再次以最纯粹的形式审视经验的本质。在早期某些文明中，这发生在自然框架内（停顿），老人得到身体上的照料，而他们的话语则被最仔细地聆听。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: You will ask me, then, the source of the wish to be. You will of course ask me the source of the source, and I will say again that only within the framework of your intense but limited camouflage universe does such a question have meaning or validity.
quotes.translation: 你接着会问我"存在意愿"的源头。你当然会追问源头的源头，而我再次强调：只有在你们强烈却有限的伪装宇宙框架内，这样的问题才具有意义或有效性。

quotes.text: There is, as I have told you, an inner (pause) "psychological" universe, from which your own emerges, and that inner universe is also the source of Framework 2 as well. It is responsible for all physical effects, and is behind all physical "laws."
quotes.translation: 正如我曾告诉你们的，存在一个内在（停顿）"心理"宇宙，你们的宇宙从中诞生，而那个内在宇宙也是框架二的源头。它负责所有物理效应，并存在于所有物理"法则"背后。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1

quotes.text: These psychological structures obviously act as stabilizing platforms, so to speak, from which energy can view itself. The psychological frameworks simply are various organizational structures that are equipped to perceive reality discriminately.
quotes.translation: 这些心理结构显然充当着稳定平台——可以这么说——能量借此得以观照自身。心理框架不过是各种组织架构，它们被设计来有区别地感知实相。
