quotes.text: The reasoning mind is a uniquely human and physical phenomenon. (Long pause.) It depends upon conscious thinking, problem-solving methods, and it is a natural human blossoming, a spectacular mental development in its own framework of activity.
quotes.translation: 理性心智是独特的人类物理现象。（长停顿。）它依赖于有意识的思考与问题解决方式，是人类的自然绽放，在其自身活动框架内堪称非凡的心智发展。

source_raw.title: While Jane has been enjoying many periods of ease and relaxation, she's also had bouts of blueness over her general stiffness and walking difficulties [her "symptoms"]. But she's finally dispensed with the last stages of her cold, which had turned out to be much heavier than mine, and is feeling a resurgence of energy for the sessions. Her own work has been going well for the most part, however--she expects to finish Chapter 12 of God of Jane tomorrow. Because of her concentration on that hook she hasn't done much on her book of poetry, If We Live Again, since late February; and as I mentioned in the Preface for Dreams, she laid aside her third Seven novel, Oversoul Seven and the Museum of Time, in May 1979 when she began God of Jane. As for myself, I've progressed to working with Session 860 [for June 13, 1979], which bridges chapters 8 and 9 in Mass Events.

quotes.text: Under most circumstances, and according to their attitude. The benefits would always be there, whether or not they were taken advantage of. To some extent this effect lingers, and is part of your psychic framework, or rather environment.
quotes.translation: 在大多数情况下，这取决于他们的态度。无论他们是否善加利用，益处始终存在。这种效应在某种程度上持续存在，并成为你们心灵框架——或更准确地说，心灵环境——的一部分。

quotes.text: To some other types of consciousness, your physical reality is clearly understood in its symbolic form. Objects, as symbols, help construct the very framework of your existence. They, the objects, can then be manipulated quite freely.
quotes.translation: 对某些其他类型的意识而言，你们的物质实相在其象征形式中被清晰理解。物体作为象征，协助构建了你们存在的整个架构。这些物体随后可以被相当自由地操控。

quotes.text: Now: Myths are natural phenomena, rising from the psyche of man as surely as giant mountain ranges emerge from the physical planet. Their deeper reality exists, however, in Framework 2 as source material for the world that you know.
quotes.translation: 现在：神话是自然现象，从人类的心灵中升起，正如巨大的山脉从物质星球上隆起。然而，它们更深层的实相存在于架构二之中，作为你们所知世界的源头材料。

source_raw.title: eth's statement at the end of dictation for the 815th session, "I will try to begin work on our book in a more predictable fashion," reflected his good intent, but things didn't turn out that way. Jane and I let the holiday season intervene to some extent, and Session 816, which came through the day after Christmas, didn't concern book work at all. Then, starting in early January, we held eight sessions having to do with questions we'd put off dealing with for a long time; some were personal and some were not. We stayed with our Monday-Saturday evening session routine, though, and kept busy with all of our other projects.1
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

source_raw.title: (First, after holding session 805 we took a six-week break from sessions of any kind. We didn't plan to do this; it just developed, and we eventually realized that it did so through Jane's simple need for a change in routine. We had plenty of other things to do: I was still occupied daily with writing notes and appendixes for Volume 2 of "Unknown" Reality; on June 4 Jane received the page proofs for Cézanne, and began correcting them for the printer; on the 14th of the month "our" contractor began converting half of our garage into a writing room for Jane, and adding a large back porch [see the end of Note 2 for Session 801]. All of that building activity was much noisier and more disruptive than the work had been for the front porch, and forced some changes in our schedules, including more night work, as we manipulated around those distractions.
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: It is your natural state of being. In its larger aspects, then, nature involves states that include both life and death in far more expansive frameworks of reference.
quotes.translation: 这是你自然的存在状态。因此，从更广阔的层面来看，自然涉及的状态包含生命与死亡，存在于更广泛的参考框架中。

quotes.text: Using this analogy, your mental and emotional life forms a framework composed of such structures, and these act directly upon the cells of your physical body.
quotes.translation: 用这个类比来说，你的心智与情感生活形成了一个由这类结构组成的框架，这些结构直接作用于你肉体的细胞。

quotes.text: An epidemic, for example, serves the purposes of each individual who is involved, while it also serves its own functions in the greater species framework.
